notes: Render this template into field-year-crop/.run/production-pilot before submitting.
The default pilot runs 2010 for h18v07 and h23v08. Override PILOT_YEARS or PILOT_TILES for a larger reviewed run.
CDL production years are 2008 through 2023 inclusive; render/preflight validation rejects years outside that range.
publication_mode=plan_only is the default. commit_gdrive publishes tile-field-year-crop-delivery.zip under /Data/ETL/tile-field-year-crop/<RUN_ID>/ through the configured rclone remote.
